comment.body: Hello Alma, I hope you are doing very well. I have a question, but more like a request 🙈. I see that sometimes you delete the messages of the signals, in my opinion, when you close the trade. Could you leave the messages undeleted? The thing is, when I get home at night, I read through the chats and save them in a document to translate them over the weekend, but I would also like to learn that part of your trading approach, when you see X and Y in the market and enter and exit quickly. (Only if you can, otherwise, no problem). In advance, thank you so much for all the knowledge you share with us, I truly value it more than you can imagine.

comment.body:
i delete them, when i mistyped something, or if i forget something to add and don't want to create a mess there. 
to avoid being accused adjusting the signals, i always leave the previous message there until i send the corrected one so plp can see that i send the same message only i add something to it
